{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Northstrider's prototype Abidan artifact
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The core [[construct]] of [[Lindon]]'s [[Divine Treasure]] is made from [[Northstrider's prototype Abidan artifact]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
